task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Volvo XC60 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $48345.00 and wholesale is $34760.00. Product features: Luxury compact SUV with Scandinavian design and advanced safety features. Reference: https://www.volvocars.com/us/cars/xc60/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Volvo XC60. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Volvo XC60. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
